case_title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. TALILOA FIAME et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT - LEASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT FIAME, TALILOA

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FIAME, TALILOA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 232 BLYTHDALE AVE. S.F. CA. 94134, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS, COMPLAINT & PREJUDGMENT CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY SERVED NOV-15-2006, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FIAME, TALILOA
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $12.60 FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY AS TO DEFENDANT FIAME, TALILOA DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT FIAME, TALILOA
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT FIAME, TALILOA
